title: Bale of Sugar Cane
description: This mod adds a bale of sugar cane for better storage of sugar cane!
body:
# Bale of Sugar Cane

Transform your sugar cane farming with the Bale of Sugar Cane mod!

Tired of managing vast fields of sugar cane in your Minecraft world? The Bale of Sugar Cane mod brings a practical and convenient solution to your farming woes. This mod allows you to compress nine sugar canes into a single, easy-to-store bale, making storage and transport a breeze.

![Bale of sugar cane crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLiB957M/images/ec3dcfff7e292e2efc0a8dfd6698a4d849e1c2ed.png)
## Features:

- Efficient Storage: Compress nine sugar canes into one bale, saving space in your inventory and chests.
  
- Quick Decompression: Instantly revert the bale back into sugar canes whenever you need them.
  
- Simple Crafting: Crafting and decompression recipes are straightforward and seamlessly integrate with the vanilla Minecraft experience.
  
- Enhance Gameplay: Ideal for large-scale farms and automated harvesting systems, making your farming more efficient and manageable.

With the Bale of Sugar Cane mod, you can focus more on building and exploring, and less on managing your resources. It’s a small but powerful addition to any Minecraft player’s toolkit.

Download now and take the hassle out of sugar cane farming!

![A full inventory of sugar, will turn into 4 full stacks of sugar cane bales](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NLiB957M/images/e379a448c0af0640c0440ead783e668d4fab14be.gif)

## Compatibility:

The Bale of Sugar Cane mod is compatible with the following Minecraft versions for Fabric:
- [1.21.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21.5)
- [1.21.3](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21.3)
- [1.21](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.21)
- [1.20 - 1.20.6](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.20.6&g=1.20.5&g=1.20.4&g=1.20.3&g=1.20.2&g=1.20&g=1.20.1)
- [1.19 - 1.19.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.19.4&g=1.19.3&g=1.19.2&g=1.19.1&g=1.19)
- [1.18.1 - 1.18.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.18.2&g=1.18.1)
- [1.16.5](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.16.5)
- [1.15.2](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.15.2)
- [1.14.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=fabric&g=1.14.4)

These versions for Forge:
- [1.20, 1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=forge)

These versions for NeoForge:
- [1.20.2, 1.20.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=neoforge)

These versions for Quilt:
- [1.20.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/bale-of-sugar-cane/versions?l=quilt)
